questions.text: The ____ of the story was very unexpected. (end/conclusion)
She ____ to school every day. (goes/come)
I have ____ seen such a beautiful sunset. (never/ever)
He is ____ in mathematics than his brother. (better/good)
Please ____ the door before you leave. (close/open)
The children are ____ in the garden now. (playing/play)
She ____ English for five years. (studies/has)
This is the ____ film I have ever watched. (best/good)
We need to ____ early tomorrow morning. (leave/arrive)
The sky is ____; it might rain soon. (cloudy/clear)
He ____ his keys somewhere in the house. (lost/found)
Can you ____ me the salt, please? (pass/give)
She is ____ in learning Chinese. (interested/interesting)
They ____ each other since childhood. (know/have)
The book ____ on the table belongs to me. (lying/lay)
I ____ like to have a cup of coffee. (would/should)
He drove so ____ that we all felt scared. (fast/fastly)
The teacher asked us to ____ the text carefully. (read/write)
Spring is the ____ season of the year. (first/warmest)
She ____ a song when I entered the room. (sang/was)
There ____ many students in the library. (are/is)
He is the ____ person I have ever met. (kindest/kind)
I ____ my homework before dinner last night. (finished/have)
The train ____ at 6 PM every evening. (arrives/arrive)
She looked ____ at the strange noise. (around/back)
We should ____ attention in class. (pay/give)
The ____ of the mountain was covered with snow. (top/side)
He ____ to be a doctor when he grows up. (wants/hopes)
I have ____ been to Beijing before. (never/ever)
The cat is ____ under the table. (hiding/hidden)
She speaks English as ____ as a native speaker. (well/good)
We ____ going to the park tomorrow. (are/is)
He ____ me a beautiful gift on my birthday. (gave/gives)
The ____ of the building is very modern. (design/paint)
I ____ agree with your opinion. (totally/complete)
She ____ her mother very much. (misses/likes)
The baby has been ____ for an hour. (crying/cry)
We ____ finish the project by Friday. (must/can)
He is ____ of heights. (afraid/scared)
The museum is ____ from 9 AM to 5 PM. (open/close)
I ____ her since we were in primary school. (know/have)
She put the keys ____ the drawer. (inside/above)
The ____ of the river is very clear. (water/sand)
He ____ a lot of progress in English this year. (made/has)
The movie was so ____ that I fell asleep. (boring/bored)
She ____ me to her birthday party yesterday. (invited/invites)
I ____ rather stay at home tonight. (would/should)
The students ____ quietly in the classroom. (sat/sit)
He is the ____ runner in the school team. (fastest/fast)
We ____ each other for ten years now. (know/have)
